summary: Phase 5 testing complete - API Keys Management UI and Public Docs Viewer. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with all features working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: Docs config endpoint accessible without auth (public)
Backend: Docs config returns correct structure (projectName, slug, gatewayUrl, spec, endpoints)
Backend: All endpoints have required fields (method, path, rateLimit)
Backend: OpenAPI spec is valid with ApiKeyAuth security scheme
Backend: Non-existent project returns 404
Backend: List API keys returns correct structure
Backend: Create API key returns raw key with sk_live_ prefix
Backend: Create and revoke key flow works correctly
Backend: Keys endpoints require authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Spec endpoint is public
Frontend: Docs page loads publicly without redirect to login
Frontend: Docs page shows top bar with project name and 'Powered by Scalable' badge
Frontend: Docs page has left TOC panel with resource groups (Orders, Payments, Products, Restaurants, Users)
Frontend: 11 endpoint cards displayed with method badges, paths, descriptions
Frontend: Each endpoint card shows auth info (X-API-Key header required) and rate limit
Frontend: Curl examples displayed with copy buttons
Frontend: Try It button correctly disabled when no defaultApiKey (expected behavior)
Frontend: Keys page loads with authentication
Frontend: Keys table shows key name, prefix, status, date, rate limit
Frontend: Create New Key modal opens with name input
Frontend: Created key displays with copy button and warning message
Frontend: Revoke confirmation modal shows key name and warning
Frontend: Revoked keys show 'Revoked' status with reduced opacity
Frontend: Sidebar correctly highlights 'API Keys' when on /keys/:projectId
critical_code_review_comments: Try It button is disabled for projects without defaultApiKey - this is correct behavior as noted in requirements. Projects deployed before the update won't have a defaultApiKey stored.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Phase5_Key and TEST_ToRevoke_Key during backend tests, TEST_UI_Key_* during frontend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features (API Keys Management and Public Docs Viewer) are fully functional. The Try It button on docs page is disabled for older projects without defaultApiKey - this is expected. Test projects: deploy-test (11 endpoints) and fast-deploy-test (2 endpoints) both have empty defaultApiKey.

expected_behaviors: Try It button disabled when defaultApiKey is empty (older projects)
Clipboard copy may fail in automated testing (browser permission) - not a real bug
Gateway requests return 401/403/502 as expected since upstream backends are mocked
